CNN Reporter on X: In private talks hours before China announced new retaliatory tariffs, the Trump admin warned China against such a move & again told them to request a Xi-Trump call, a source tells me. Still this AM no trade talks with China Trade Rep Greer.
US warned China against retaliating in private talks - CNN.

news.summary: Amgen, a company based in Thousand Oaks, California, revealed on April 11, 2025, the results of a significant Phase 3 clinical trial named DeLLphi-304. The trial demonstrated a substantial survival advantage over chemotherapy for patients who had experienced progression following platinum-based chemotherapy. This study marks the first global Phase 3 trial to show such promising results, providing hope for improved outcomes for patients. Unfortunately, specific numbers or statistics regarding the survival advantage were not provided in the given information.
news.headline: IMDELLTRA® shows superior overall survival in small cell lung cancer. Phase 3 trial demonstrates substantial advantage over chemotherapy. Amgen announces results.

news.summary: A new team has joined the WNBA, marking the first expansion in the league since 2008. This exciting development introduces professional women's basketball to the Bay Area for the first time. The team, named United, aims to offer skills development initiatives for aspiring female athletes and contribute to local youth sports programs. The announcement was made in San Francisco on April 11, 2025, heralding a significant step forward for women's basketball in the region.
news.headline: United Airlines partners with Golden State Valkyries, WNBA's newest expansion team in Bay Area, supporting female athletes.

news.summary: Today, on April 11, 2025, in Miami, Innovative Eyewear, Inc. unveiled their latest developments. The company, known for its smart eyewear products under the Lucyd®, Nautica®, Eddie Bauer®, and Reebok® brands, has entered into definitive agreements. Operating under the Nasdaq symbol LUCY, Innovative Eyewear is a leader in the industry. This announcement signifies a significant step forward for the company.
news.headline: Innovative Eyewear, Inc. raised $1.8 million through warrant exercise with Lucyd®, Nautica®, Eddie Bauer®, and Reebok® brands.

news.summary: In Dijon, France on April 11, 2025, PROTEOR, a prominent company in prosthetics and orthotics, revealed advancements in its Digital solutions. They introduced a groundbreaking innovation: developing non-vase mode definitive sockets using 3D Printing technology. This development marks a significant step in the industry with a focus on customization and efficiency.
news.headline: PROTEOR expands with first-ever Non-Vase Mode Definitive Socket via 3D Printing, setting new industry standard.

news.summary: Graeter's Ice Cream, the oldest family-owned craft ice cream maker in America, has partnered with New Riff Distilling, a renowned Kentucky-based distillery, to introduce a special Single Barrel Bourbon Ice Cream. This collaboration celebrates the rich flavors of Kentucky and marks a significant milestone for Graeter's. The new ice cream flavor is made exclusively with bourbon from New Riff's distillery, adding a unique twist to the dessert. The partnership was announced on April 11, 2025, and has garnered attention for blending the expertise of the two well-established brands. This special Bourbon Ice Cream represents a delicious fusion of craftsmanship and tradition, showcasing the best of both Graeter's Ice Cream and New Riff Distilling. Cheers to this exciting new flavor!Total Characters: 681
news.headline: Graeter's Ice Cream and New Riff Distilling collaborate on Bourbon Ball Ice Cream, launched on April 11, 2025.

news.summary: QuantaSing Group Ltd., an adult education company, has recently diversified its portfolio by acquiring a controlling stake in fantasy toy maker Letsvan. This move signals the company's entry into the growing sector for experiential toys for all ages. QuantaSing's stock price more than doubled after the announcement, showcasing investor enthusiasm for the new venture. Letsvan specializes in trending toy IPs, catering to the Chinese pop toy development market. This acquisition aligns with QuantaSing's strategy to expand beyond its core adult education business into other products and services, particularly for seniors and now for the youth market. The investment demonstrates QuantaSing's ambition to tap into the ACGN boom in China through Letsvan's innovative toy offerings. The company's rising profits and strong cash flow are expected to support this new venture.
news.headline: QuantaSing diversifies into toy market by acquiring Letsvan, boosting stock by 50%. Company shifts focus to youth market.

news.summary: A new bitcoin operating system designed for businesses to manage treasury, payments, and operations has been launched by Theya in San Francisco. The system offers secure and scalable features, including collaborative and payment vaults for enhanced functionality.
news.headline: Theya introduces bitcoin OS for businesses; offers treasury, payments, & ops management with collaborative & payment vaults.

news.summary: A fiber internet service provider named Kinetic, together with the Fort Bend County and North Fort Bend County’s Chambers of Commerce, held a groundbreaking event in Sugar Land, Texas for a $13 million high-speed fiber internet expansion project. This initiative aims to connect more than 22,000 households in the area. The project in Fort Bend involves the installation of fiber connections for approximately 2,200 households monthly throughout the year. Kinetic's dedication to improving technological infrastructure is evident in this significant investment.
news.headline: Kinetic and Fort Bend County embark on $13 million fiber internet project, aiming to connect 22,000 households, 2,200 monthly.

news.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) is set to hold a live webcast of its first-quarter earnings conference call for 2025 on April 25, 2025, starting at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. This event will be led by Noel Wallace, the Chairman, President, and CEO, Stan Sutula, the Chief Financial Officer, and John Faucher, the Chief Investor Relations Officer and EVP of M&A. Interested investors can tune in to the call and access relevant materials, including the earnings press release, through a live audio webcast on Colgate's website at the provided link.
news.headline: Colgate-Palmolive's 2025 Q1 earnings call on April 25, 2025, 8:30 a.m. ET, with CEO and CFO. Webcast available.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, retailers are encountering a critical market juncture that will challenge not only their profits but also their credibility. The imposition of tariffs is shedding light on the retailers' ability to manage costs effectively, raising questions about their strategies in mitigating the impact on consumers. Gautam Narang, the CEO and co-founder of Gatik, a prominent player in self-driving mid-distance transportation, collaborates closely with major retail corporations such as Walmart, Kroger, and Tyson. He possesses insights into the substantial undisclosed expenses in logistics, totaling billions of dollars, which are on the verge of being shifted.
news.headline: Tariffs will test retailers' margins and reputations. Gatik, a leader in autonomous logistics, works with giants like Walmart.

news.summary: Mytheresa, traded as NYSE: MYTE, has obtained unconditional merger control clearance from the European Commission for acquiring YNAP from Richemont (SWX:CFR) through Richemont Italia Holding S.P.A. The transaction is set to be finalized on 23 April 2025, after receiving all required approvals from regulatory bodies. The acquisition was agreed upon on 7 October 2024, with binding agreements signed by Mytheresa and Richemont.
news.headline: Mytheresa to acquire YNAP from Richemont with final regulatory clearance received, closing set for 23 April 2025. #Acquisition #BusinessExpansion

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, SoLa Impact completed a funding round of $29 million through New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) financing. This funding will support two significant community-focused projects at Crenshaw Lofts, which is a leading mixed-use development with 190 units situated at 4607 Crenshaw.
news.headline: SoLa Impact secures $29M in NMTC financing for Crenshaw Lofts tech center & workforce facilities.

news.summary: In an event held in Foster City, California on April 11, 2025, Coupa showcased how its AI-native platform is helping customers navigate current disruptions to enhance productivity and foster growth. The event, Coupa Inspire 2025, featured over 100 customer testimonials illustrating the effectiveness of Coupa's solutions in driving profitability and efficiency.
news.headline: Coupa Inspire 2025 showcases how customers are navigating disruptions with AI platform, featuring 100+ customer stories.

news.summary: A company backed by $14 million in funding and experienced roboticists is preparing to unveil a fully autonomous ship for the U.S. Navy. Blue Water Autonomy, Inc., which specializes in developing cutting-edge technology for autonomous vessels, recently emerged from secrecy. The company's innovative project aims to provide the U.S. Navy with state-of-the-art autonomous ships, showcasing their commitment to enhancing naval operations through technology.
news.headline: Blue Water Autonomy debuts, raising $14M to create autonomous ships for US Navy, marking new era in maritime tech.

news.summary: Mytheresa's parent company, MYT Netherlands Parent B.V., has been granted the final regulatory approval to acquire YOOX NET-A-PORTER (YNAP) from Richemont. The acquisition is scheduled to be completed on April 23, 2025.
news.headline: Mytheresa gets approval to buy YOOX NET-A-PORTER from Richemont, closing on April 23, 2025.

news.summary: Dallas-based Flowserve Corporation (NYSE:FLS), a prominent provider of flow control products and services worldwide, will release its first quarter 2025 earnings after the NYSE closing on Tuesday, April 29. The company's earnings call will take place the next day, Wednesday, April 30, at 10:00 a.m. ET. This call will provide an opportunity to discuss and analyze the company's performance during the initial quarter of the year.
news.headline: Flowserve (NYSE: FLS) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, with conference call on April 30 at 10am ET.

news.summary: DFRobot, a renowned company in the open-source hardware industry, revealed today in Shanghai on April 11, 2025, that they have effectively launched their advanced single-board computers named LattePanda Delta and LattePanda Sigma, in partnership with cutting-edge environmental sensors. These products have been deployed in the European Space sector.
news.headline: DFRobot supplies open-source hardware for SAGA's FLEXHab in Artemis Moon training. Uses LattePanda Delta & Sigma with environmental sensors.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, the cryptocurrency market saw a surge in memecoins, leading to questions about their legitimacy and political implications. The frenzy around memecoins raised concerns about the intersection of innovation, opportunism, and influence. The involvement of figures like US President Donald Trump and Argentina's President Javier Milei in memecoin controversies added to the industry's challenges in seeking legitimacy. Despite regulatory progress and institutional support in the crypto industry, the spectacle surrounding memecoins threatened to overshadow these advancements. The team also noted concerns about stablecoin legislation and its potential political implications, such as Trump-linked initiatives launching stablecoins. This quarter saw a focus on Bitcoin's institutional growth and memecoin excitement, with altcoins struggling to gain traction amidst the memecoin craze. The quarter's defining themes included the rise of memecoins, regulatory issues, and the impact of political figures on the crypto industry.
news.headline: Crypto journalists discuss Q1's major stories: rise of memecoins, stablecoin legislation, altcoin struggles, Trump influence. Tune in for insights!
Blackrock CEO Fink: We’re very close, if not in a recession - CNBC Interview.

news.summary: Valentino Beauty has recently launched its latest lip product, Puffer Gloss, in Paris on April 11, 2025. This innovative lip gloss offers a blend of volume, shine, and nourishment. By merging the benefits of lip gloss and lip oil, Valentino Beauty introduces a high-shine formula designed to enhance the lips.
news.headline: Valentino Beauty releases Puffer Gloss, offering extra plump, shine, and care for lips, revolutionizing the beauty industry.

news.summary: Tap into the potential of reaching millions of viewers every day by reserving your spot directly on Eightpoint's Wave homepage. The company, based in George Town, Cayman Islands, has introduced Native Direct Deals to facilitate direct advertising placements. This initiative aims to connect advertisers with the extensive audience base of the platform. Don't miss out on this opportunity to secure your direct placement and capitalize on the massive daily views.
news.headline: Eightpoint announces Native Direct Deals for ad placement on Wave homepage, connecting advertisers with millions of daily views.

news.summary: Ally has been announced as the Presenting Partner for the WNBA's inaugural "Rivals Week," featuring exciting games from August 9 to 17. Furthermore, Ally has launched a new sweepstakes giving fans an opportunity to win a trip to the AT&T WNBA All-Star 2025 event in Indianapolis along with $5,000 in cash. This partnership strengthens Ally's commitment to supporting women's sports and enhancing the fan experience.
news.headline: WNBA partners with Ally Financial; Ally to present "Rivals Week". Sweepstakes offer fans a trip to WNBA All-Star 2025 and $5,000.

news.summary: Acquisition positions International Food Solutions, Inc. (IFS) to cater to the increasing demand for culturally relevant meals delivered to homes in diverse communities. The company, based in Orlando, Florida, announced on April 11, 2025, that it has made a strategic move to meet this growing need. IFS is known for offering ready-to-serve meals that are tailored to various cultural preferences and dietary requirements. The acquisition is expected to enhance IFS's ability to serve aged and diverse populations seeking these specialized meal options.
news.headline: International Food Solutions acquires Food With Care to address rising demand for home-delivered, culturally relevant meals for seniors.

news.summary: Shinsegae Department Store has introduced a new distinctive area by renovating a historic structure in Myeong-dong. Named 'The Heritage,' this space showcases Korean craftsmanship and modern artifacts, providing a one-of-a-kind experience for international visitors. The first floor houses the luxury boutique, adding to the allure of the place.
news.headline: Shinsegae unveils 'The Heritage' in Seoul, showcasing Korean culture and luxury in historical building in Myeong-dong.

news.summary: In Maumee, Ohio, on April 11, 2025, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) announced its plans to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. The official press release is scheduled for 7 a.m. EDT, with a subsequent conference call and webcast set for 9 a.m. EDT. This will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's performance and trajectory.
news.headline: Dana Inc. in Ohio (NYSE: DAN) to announce Q1 2025 results on April 30 with press release at 7am EDT, followed by call at 9am EDT.

news.summary: Over 15,000 nominations have been received to endorse pet rescues across the country. The nationwide pet rescue organizations are encountering heightened difficulties such as overcrowding, surge in surrenders, escalating expenses, and insufficient funding. The news was disclosed on April 11, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: "15,000+ nominations for heroic pet rescues honored on National Pet Day by PetPlace® and Pets Best Insurance. Challenges faced highlighted."

news.summary: A premier aesthetics destination, SkinSpirit, has expanded its award-winning services to Sarasota, Florida, marking its 52nd location. This unveiling follows the successful launch in Miami earlier in April 2025. SkinSpirit has established itself as a leader in the industry and continues to grow its presence in key locations.
news.headline: SkinSpirit opens its 52nd location in Sarasota, FL, expanding its services to the area after Miami.

news.summary: Introducing the latest addition to the Goodnites® lineup, the XXL size is now on the market to provide better nights for more children. Recently unveiled in Chicago on April 11, 2025, the #1 nighttime underwear brand has expanded its range to accommodate kids weighing up to 165 lbs. With a strong commitment to ensuring that bedwetting does not limit a child's potential, Goodnites® aims to support families with this inclusive new sizing option.
news.headline: Goodnites® introduces XXL size nighttime underwear for kids up to 165 lbs, aiming to provide better nights for more children.

news.summary: China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) was recognized as "Hospital of the Year" and its CEO was awarded "CEO of the Year" at the 2025 Healthcare Asia Awards in Kuala Lumpur. This prestigious accolade demonstrates the hospital's commitment to smart healthcare and sustainable leadership. The event highlighted CMUH's excellence in the healthcare industry and its significant contributions to the field. This achievement underscores the hospital's dedication to providing quality care and innovative solutions. The awards ceremony celebrated CMUH's outstanding performance and its positive impact on the community.
news.headline: China Medical University Hospital wins "Hospital of the Year" and "CEO of the Year" at 2025 Healthcare Asia Awards, showcasing smart healthcare and sustainable leadership.

news.summary: In preparation for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, graduate students from 20 different business schools participated in a complex supply chain and marketing simulation for Frito-Lay. The event took place in Newark, N.J. on April 11, 2025. Among the competitors, four students from Rutgers Business School emerged as champions, beating out peers from Texas Christian University in the Supply Chain competition.
news.headline: Rutgers Business School students won TCU graduate supply chain case competition, beating out 20 schools.

news.summary: In April, customers making a $75+ purchase at Honey Play Box will receive a complimentary gift, while those spending $125+ can unlock a mystery bundle. Additionally, subscribers to the email list can expect an exclusive offer on April 14th. The company is based in Chino, California, and this promotion is set for Spring 2025.
news.headline: Limited-time deals at Honey Play Box: free gift with $75+ purchase, mystery bundle with $125+. Exclusive offer on April 14th.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India on April 11, 2025, it was reported that the Fire Resistant Cable Market is categorized by Type (XPLE, LSZH, PVC, EPR) and Application (Building & Construction, Automotive & Transportation, Manufacturing, Energy). The worldwide market for Fire Resistant Cable had a value of USD 11,900...
news.headline: Fire Resistant Cable Market expected to hit $15.2 billion by 2031, with current value at $11.9 billion. driven by safety regulations and smart infrastructure growth.

news.summary: HairUWear, a leading alternative hair company, is unveiling a groundbreaking innovation in the wig industry. Introducing the Raquel collection featuring FeatherLite™ fiber and the newly designed LuxLite Cap® II. This new line is set to redefine the world of wigs with its cutting-edge technology. HairUWear, recognized as the top alternative hair company globally, is proud to introduce this revolutionary product to the market. Experience the future of wigs with the Raquel collection, which combines FeatherLite™ fiber with the upgraded LuxLite Cap® II for the ultimate comfort and style.
news.headline: Raquel Welch® introduces revolutionary FeatherLite™ technology for wigs, improving with LuxLite Cap® II. Leading alternative hair company.

news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on April 11, 2025, Norne Thorning Storage ApS, a subsidiary of Fidelis New Energy, LLC, has secured the Exploration License for the Thorning structure from the Danish Minister of Climate, Energy, and Utilities. This license grants Norne the authority to begin operations on the site.
news.headline: Danish government awards Norne Thorning Storage license to explore CO2 storage in Jutland.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Stock Symbol: LUCD) shared the completion of its underwritten transaction. As a cancer prevention medical diagnostics firm, Lucid operates under PAVmed Inc. (Stock Symbol: PAVM). This development signifies a significant step for the company as it operates in the commercial stage.
news.headline: Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD) closes public offering of common stock. Subsidiary of PAVmed Inc. (Nasdaq: PAVM).

news.summary: St. Paul, Minnesota - On April 11, 2025, Panacea Healthcare Solutions revealed the nationwide rollout of its Medicaid Eligibility Program. This expansion stems from the effective program originally formulated by KA Consulting, a reputable player in healthcare financial services. The program's extension across the country signifies a significant stride in increasing access to Medicaid services for a greater number of individuals.
news.headline: Panacea Healthcare Solutions expands nationwide Medicaid Eligibility Program, building on KA Consulting's success in healthcare finance.
